name: Zucchini Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Lightly grease a 9x13-inch baking dish and set aside.
3. In a small saucepan, melt margarine and stir in flour and chili powder to make a thick paste.
4. Gradually add milk a little at a time, whisking well after each addition.
5. Add both cheeses and heat gently until melted.
6. Steam zucchini until just tender, about 10 minutes.
7. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat and cook onion, green chiles, and garlic until limp, 3-5 minutes.
8. Add zucchini and two-thirds of the sauce to the skillet. Toss gently to coat.
9. Spoon filling into each tortilla and roll, placing seam side down in baking pan.
10. Spoon remaining sauce over all and sprinkle with tomatoes.
11. Bake for 30 minutes until hot and bubbly.
